properties.name: jwt.secret.access
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key used to sign access tokens.

properties.name: jwt.secret.refresh
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key used to sign refresh tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.node-env
properties.description: Active environment: 'development' or 'production'. Controls cookie secure/sameSite flags.

properties.name: app.client-url
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: app.admin-emails
properties.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses automatically granted ADMIN role on registration.
